concepts.title: Projective points and lines
concepts.blurb: P^2 extends affine geometry by homogeneous coordinates and points at infinity.

concepts.title: Homogeneous equations and charts
concepts.blurb: Polynomial equations homogenize naturally and are studied chartwise.

concepts.title: Projective automorphisms
concepts.blurb: PGL actions describe coordinate changes preserving incidence.

concepts.title: Projective duality
concepts.blurb: Points and lines of P^2 swap roles under the canonical isomorphism P^2 ≅ (P^2)*, turning every incidence theorem into its dual.

concepts.title: The cross-ratio
concepts.blurb: The cross-ratio of four collinear points is the unique PGL-invariant of their configuration and classifies quadruples up to projective equivalence.
